raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta irr weena pahrgal-
wiga Tauta/ tee irr Metkutu
Behrnt/ Behrnt/ kas ta KUN-
GA Bauffibu ne grib klaufibt/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas us teem Redsetajeem
fakka: Ne raugajt/ un us teein
Redsetajeem/ ne redseet mums
pateefu Mahzibu. Runnajt ar
mums lehnigt/ raugajt muus
Wiltibas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Atkahpeet no ta Zetta/
atkahjeet no tahs Tekkas/ lai
tas Swehtajs eekſch Israëta pee
mums mittejahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht fakka tas Sweh-
tajs eekſch Israëta ta: Ta-
pehz ka juhs scho Wahrdnu
atmettat/ un pataujatees us
Warras-Darbu un Blehdibu/
un palaischatees us to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tapehz buhs jums schis
Nozeeguns itt ka Plaisums pee
weena grusdama eelihkuscha aug-
sta Muhra/ ka Satreefschana pee-
peschi weenâ Azzumirkli nahks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch falaufihs to ta-
patt ka Bohoneeka Traufs tohy
fad ausihts/ fadausidains wiꞥſch
ne taupihs/ ta ka no wirra Sa-
treefschanas netweens atteekams
Gabbaltisch atrastins buhs/ ar
ko warretu Ugguni no Ugguns-
Kurra nemt/jeb Uhdeni finelt no
tahs Akkas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas KUNgs
KUNGS/ tas Swehtajs eekſch
Israëta: Zaur Atgreefschann un
Duffschanu taptut juhs ts-
glahbtuzant kluſſu Buhschanu un
Zerribu warretut juhs stipri buht,
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un juhs faſſat: Ne/ be-
us Sirgeem grihbain meh-
behgt/ tapehz buhs jums behgt
un us tchalleem Sirgeem gri-
bain mehs jaht/ tapehz ir juhs
Pakkatsinneji buhs tchakki.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tuhſtoſehi behgß no we-
na weeniga Lammaschanas/ u-
no peezu Lammaschanas ju-
wift/ famehr juhs ta tohpat a-
lizzinati/ ka weens Masta-Roh-
Kalua Wirfu/ un ka weens Ka-
rogs Pakalna Wirfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tadeht gaſda ta-
KUNGS/ ka wiꞥſch jum-
schebligs effus/ un irr pa-augst-
najees/ ka wiꞥſch pahr jums ap-
schehlojahs/ jo tas KUNGS i-
weenſ Deetws tahs Teefa-
Swehtigee irr wiffi/ kas us wi-
au zerre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tee Laudis no Zian-
dsihwobs Jerusaleme/ tu ra-
daht ne raudafi/ apschehlod-
meeſ wiꞥſch pahr tew apschehl-
tees us to Balft tawas Peeſau-
schanas/ ko wiꞥſch tew dsirde-
to wiꞥſch tew atbildehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS gan do-
jums Behdn Maist un Jsbail-
Uhdeni. Tomehr tawi Mah-
tai ne nobehgs wairs ka
Spahrneem/ bet tawaß Az-
redsehs tawus Mahzitajus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tawas Ausis dsirde-
to Wahrdnu pakkat tewi tafkan-
Schis irr tas Zeſsch/ staigajt-
to/zittadi net pa labbo nei pa fr-
to Rohku.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
